isolation.notes: Unit tests are self-contained with no shared state concerns

steps.action: Run radar-core cluster tests
steps.expected: Tests for topic-based clustering pass
steps.observed: All 8 cluster tests passed

steps.action: Verify test 'separates signals with different topics into different threads'
steps.expected: 3 signals on topic A (GPU/chip) and 2 on topic B (military/conflict) produce at least 2 distinct threads
steps.observed: Test passes: creates ≥2 threads, tech signals grouped together, geo signals grouped together, thread IDs are distinct

steps.action: Verify test 'groups similar signals into the same thread'
steps.expected: 3 similar signals cluster together
steps.observed: Test passes: all 3 signals with shared GPU/chip/shortage terms are in the same thread

relevantTests: cluster > separates signals with different topics into different threads
cluster > groups similar signals into the same thread
cluster > clusters cross-source signals (Bluesky + Reddit) on the same topic together
cluster > produces valid Thread objects conforming to the Zod schema

steps.action: Run radar-core snapshot-reducer tests
steps.expected: Tests for bounded score ranges pass
steps.observed: All 13 reducer tests passed

steps.action: Verify test 'score ranges have valid min <= max bounds'
steps.expected: Every score range has min <= median <= max, all values in [0,1]
steps.observed: Test passes: asserts min <= median <= max and 0 <= min, max <= 1 for every scoreRange

steps.action: Verify test 'produces a valid RadarSnapshot from a single thread'
steps.expected: Snapshot has scoreRanges with lower/upper bounds
steps.observed: Test passes: snapshot.scoreRanges.length >= 1, validates against Zod schema

relevantTests: reduce > score ranges have valid min <= max bounds
reduce > produces a valid RadarSnapshot from a single thread
reduce > produces a valid RadarSnapshot from multiple threads with different categories
reduce > snapshot validates against Zod schema

steps.action: Run radar-core reducer disagreement tests
steps.expected: Disagreement index = 0 for identical confidence, > 0 for differing
steps.observed: Test passes all 3 sub-cases

steps.action: Verify identical confidence case
steps.expected: 3 threads with confidence 0.5 → disagreementIndex = 0
steps.observed: snapshotSame.disagreementIndex === 0 ✓

steps.action: Verify differing confidence case
steps.expected: Threads with confidence 0.1 and 0.9 → disagreementIndex > 0
steps.observed: snapshotMixed.disagreementIndex > 0 and <= 1 ✓

steps.action: Verify extreme disagreement case
steps.expected: Threads with confidence 0.0 and 1.0 → disagreementIndex >= 0.9
steps.observed: snapshotExtreme.disagreementIndex >= 0.9 ✓

relevantTests: reduce > computes disagreement index correctly
reduce > produces a valid RadarSnapshot from multiple threads with different categories

steps.action: Run radar-core reducer determinism tests
steps.expected: Shuffled and reversed inputs produce identical outputs
steps.observed: Both determinism tests pass

steps.action: Verify test 'DETERMINISM: shuffled inputs produce identical outputs'
steps.expected: 5 threads shuffled with 3 different seeds all produce output identical to baseline
steps.observed: shuffle(threads, 42), shuffle(threads, 12345), shuffle(threads, 99999) all toEqual(baseline) ✓

steps.action: Verify test 'DETERMINISM: reversed input produces identical output'
steps.expected: 3 threads in forward vs reversed order produce identical output
steps.observed: reversed toEqual(forward) ✓

relevantTests: reduce > DETERMINISM: shuffled inputs produce identical outputs
reduce > DETERMINISM: reversed input produces identical output

assertions.title: SignalEvents Published as AT Protocol Records

steps.action: Run signal-atproto converter tests for SignalEvent
steps.expected: SignalEvent converts to valid AT Protocol record
steps.observed: Both toAtprotoSignalEvent tests pass

steps.action: Verify test 'serializes a SignalEvent to AT Protocol record format'
steps.expected: Record has $type='app.openhax.radar.signalEvent', correct field mapping
steps.observed: All fields mapped correctly: $type, provenanceSource, provenanceAuthor, text, title, links, domainTags, contentHash, observedAt, ingestedAt ✓

steps.action: Verify test 'handles optional/undefined provenance fields gracefully'
steps.expected: Minimal event converts without errors, optional fields are undefined
steps.observed: Minimal event converts; provenanceAuthor, provenancePostUri, title, contentHash all undefined ✓

relevantTests: toAtprotoSignalEvent > serializes a SignalEvent to AT Protocol record format
toAtprotoSignalEvent > handles optional/undefined provenance fields gracefully
publishSignalEvent + read-back > publishes a SignalEvent and returns a valid AT URI

assertions.title: Threads Published as AT Protocol Records

steps.action: Run signal-atproto converter tests for Thread
steps.expected: Thread converts to valid AT Protocol record with member refs
steps.observed: toAtprotoThread test passes

steps.action: Verify test 'serializes a Thread to AT Protocol record format with member refs'
steps.expected: Record has $type='app.openhax.radar.thread', memberRefs array, all metadata fields
steps.observed: All fields correct: $type, radarId, kind, title, memberRefs=['sig-001','sig-002'], sourceDistribution, confidence, domainTags, status, timeline fields ✓

relevantTests: toAtprotoThread > serializes a Thread to AT Protocol record format with member refs
publishThread + read-back > publishes a Thread and returns a valid AT URI

assertions.title: Reduced Snapshots Published as AT Protocol Records

steps.action: Run signal-atproto converter tests for Snapshot
steps.expected: ReducedSnapshot converts to valid AT Protocol record with flattened ranges
steps.observed: toAtprotoSnapshot test passes

steps.action: Verify test 'serializes a ReducedSnapshot with flattened signal ranges'
steps.expected: Record has $type='app.openhax.radar.snapshot', flattened signal ranges (rangeLow/rangeHigh), branches array
steps.observed: All fields correct: $type, radarId, snapshotKind, modelCount, disagreementIndex, qualityScore, signals.geopolitical.rangeLow=1, rangeHigh=4, branches with name/support/triggers ✓

relevantTests: toAtprotoSnapshot > serializes a ReducedSnapshot with flattened signal ranges
publishSnapshot + read-back > publishes a Snapshot and returns a valid AT URI

steps.action: Run signal-atproto publisher round-trip tests
steps.expected: Published records can be read back with matching content
steps.observed: All 3 round-trip tests pass (SignalEvent, Thread, Snapshot)

steps.action: Verify SignalEvent round-trip
steps.expected: Publish → getRecord → content fields match original
steps.observed: readBack.value.$type, text, title, provenanceSource, provenanceAuthor, domainTags, contentHash, observedAt all match ✓

steps.action: Verify Thread round-trip
steps.expected: Publish → getRecord → thread fields match original
steps.observed: readBack.value.$type, title, kind, radarId, memberRefs, sourceDistribution, confidence, status all match ✓

steps.action: Verify Snapshot round-trip
steps.expected: Publish → getRecord → snapshot fields and signal ranges match
steps.observed: readBack.value.$type, radarId, snapshotKind, modelCount, disagreementIndex, qualityScore match; signals.geopolitical.median=2.5, rangeLow=1, rangeHigh=4; 2 branches with correct names ✓

relevantTests: publishSignalEvent + read-back > reads back a published SignalEvent with matching content
publishThread + read-back > reads back a published Thread with matching content
publishSnapshot + read-back > reads back a published Snapshot with matching content

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed. radar-core (55/55 tests pass): clustering, reducer score ranges, disagreement index, and determinism all verified. signal-atproto (16/16 tests pass): AT Protocol conversion for SignalEvent, Thread, and Snapshot plus publish→read-back round-trip all verified.
